_comment: Bricks element registry. Single source of truth for per-element metadata used by the build pipeline and read paths. Each entry describes one Bricks element type.
_maintenance: Per-element fields: valid_parents (required, array of allowed parent types or 'root'), accepts_children (required, bool), typical_children (optional, array for containers), content_key (optional, string — the Bricks settings key that schema.content maps to), default_tag (optional, string — default HTML tag), flex_by_default (optional, bool — pipeline auto-applies _display:flex), structural (optional, bool — a layout element rather than content), skip_auto_flex (optional, bool — nested elements that manage their own layout), nestable (optional, bool — Bricks nestable element with child-element support), element_settings_defaults (optional, object — sane defaults merged into settings when no element_settings given), purpose (optional, string — one-line description served to AI), capabilities (optional, array — what the element can do), rules (optional, array — do's and don'ts for the AI), notes (optional, string — free-form hints).

accordion.notes: Deprecated base version. Use accordion-nested for customizable accordion content — its child divs are the panes.

accordion-nested.notes: Each accordion item is a div child.
capabilities: multiple panels with any nested content

alert.purpose: Notification banner — info, success, warning, error
rules: content goes in the alert text setting; choose alert type for color

animated-typing.notes: Compositional element — 'prefix' + animated 'strings' array + 'suffix'. schema.content maps to prefix (static text before animation). Use element_settings for the 'strings' array with actual animated words.
animated-typing.purpose: Typewriter / typing animation effect — cycles through a list of strings
rules: use element_settings.strings (array of strings to cycle), typeSpeed (ms per char)

block.purpose: Structural grouping — columns, rows, card wrappers
capabilities: semantic HTML tags (ul, li, article, nav, figure)
rules: use block for horizontal rows — NOT div (div ignores _direction)

capabilities: ICON support — native icon left/right of text (ti-mobile, ti-comment-alt, etc.)
link with tel: or https:// URL
style variants via class_intent (primary, outline, ghost)
rules: use native icon feature — do NOT put emoji in button text

carousel.notes: Simple carousel element (non-nested). For custom carousel content, use slider-nested with div children.

container.purpose: Content container inside a section — controls max-width and centering
rules: DO NOT set _gap — child theme handles it
use multiple containers for multiple visual rows

countdown.notes: Countdown timer to a target date/time.

div.notes: Does NOT default to flex. Requires explicit _display: flex for flex layouts.
div.purpose: Small wrapper — icon circles, overlays, decorative containers
rules: does NOT support _direction — use block instead for rows

dropdown.notes: Dropdown menu container (nestable). Children are the dropdown items.

form.notes: Schema must supply 'fields' array via element_settings. The pipeline no longer injects default field templates — AI must specify newsletter/contact/login fields explicitly per site language/branding.
capabilities: text fields, email, textarea, select, checkbox
HTML in content — use text for colored words
tag: h1 for page titles, h2 for sections, h3-h4 for cards
rules: DO NOT set font-size, color, line-height, font-weight — child theme handles all heading styles

capabilities: Themify icon library (ti-truck, ti-shield, ti-timer, etc.)

icon-box.notes: Content key is 'content' (HTML body), verified against Bricks 2.3 working_example. 'title' is a separate heading field, not the content.
icon-box.purpose: Feature card — icon + heading + text combined
capabilities: built-in icon, title, and description fields
good for feature grids and service highlights

image-gallery.notes: Gallery of images. Supports loadMoreInitial / loadMoreStep / loadMoreInfiniteScroll for progressive loading.

map.notes: Google Maps embed with address or coordinates.

offcanvas.notes: Off-canvas slide-in panel (nestable). Triggered by a toggle/button.

rules: use element_settings.percent (integer 0-100), barColor and trackColor are {raw} color objects

popup.notes: Popup content container (nestable). Lives inside a popup template.

capabilities: plan name, price, features list, CTA button

progress-bar.purpose: Animated horizontal progress bar — for skill bars, completion meters
capabilities: multiple bars in one element via "bars" array
rules: use element_settings.bars for an array of {label, percentage} objects
pair with a heading for context

rating.purpose: Star rating display (or other icon) — for review summaries, product ratings
rules: use element_settings.rating (number 0-maxRating)

section.purpose: Full-width page section — the outermost wrapper
rules: DO NOT set _padding — child theme handles it
only contains containers as direct children

slider.notes: Deprecated base version. Use slider-nested — each slide is a div child.

slider-nested.purpose: Image or content carousel/slideshow (Splide.js under the hood)
capabilities: multiple slides with any nested content
configurable slides per view, gap, speed, loop
rules: Bricks uses Splide.js — NOT Swiper. Use Splide setting keys.
perPage (string) — slides visible at once. e.g. '4'. NOT slidesToShow or slidesPerView.
gap (string) — space between slides in px. Use 'var(--content-gap)' or 'var(--grid-gap)' from design system. NOT spaceBetween.
arrows (bool) — show prev/next navigation arrows.
dots (bool) — show pagination dots.
autoplay (bool) — auto-advance slides.
speed (int) — transition speed in ms.
loop (bool) — infinite loop.
centeredSlides (bool) — center the active slide.
Each slide is a div (or block) child of the slider-nested element.
slider-nested.notes: Bricks slider-nested uses Splide.js. Key names: perPage (not slidesToShow/slidesPerView), gap (not spaceBetween), arrows (not navigation), dots (not pagination). Always use CSS variables for gap (e.g. var(--content-gap)).

social-icons.purpose: Row of social media icons with links
rules: each icon needs a URL; pair with a heading for context

svg.notes: Inline SVG element. Content stored in 'code' or 'file' setting.

tabs.notes: Deprecated base version. Use tabs-nested — its child divs are the tab panes (tabs-nested supports rich content per pane; plain tabs only takes a string repeater).

tabs-nested.notes: Each tab pane is a div child.
tabs-nested.purpose: Tabbed content panels — each tab has full nested content
capabilities: multiple tab panes with any content inside
rules: use tabs-nested NOT tabs — basic tabs only support plain text

template.notes: Embeds another Bricks template (header, footer, section, content).

text-basic.purpose: Paragraph or body text — descriptions, subtitles, taglines, eyebrows
capabilities: can be styled as tagline/eyebrow via class_intent
rules: DO NOT set font-size, color, line-height — child theme handles body text styles

toggle.notes: Toggle button — triggers the visibility of a target element (offcanvas, dropdown, etc.).

toggle-mode.notes: Bricks 2.3+ light/dark mode toggle button. No content — configured via icon/iconColor/iconSize + iconDark/iconDarkColor/iconDarkSize + ariaLabel.

capabilities: YouTube, Vimeo, or self-hosted video URL
